description: Brazilian militia of elite hitmen operating in the west zone of Rio de Janeiro, founded in 2007. It originated from illegal real estate activities such as land grabbing, construction, and illegal sale and rental of properties, with its main activity being contract killings. The group is composed of military police officers and former police, commanded by former BOPE captain Adriano Nóbrega and PM major Ronald Paulo Alves Pereira. It is suspected of involvement in 19 unsolved homicides since 2002, including the assassination of councilwoman Marielle Franco.
